item:blueprint-bio-waste-processor-t2.description: Build plan that upgrades Bio-Waste Processor I into Bio-Waste Processor II for coal and charcoal disposal lines.
item:blueprint-bio-waste-processor-t2.name: Bio-Waste Processor II Blueprint

item:blueprint-brickyard.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct a Brickyard.
item:blueprint-brickyard.name: Brickyard Blueprint

item:blueprint-charcoal-burner-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Charcoal Burner I.
item:blueprint-charcoal-burner-t1.name: Charcoal Burner I Blueprint

item:blueprint-clay-pit.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct a Clay Pit.
item:blueprint-clay-pit.name: Clay Pit Blueprint

item:blueprint-construction-yard-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Construction Yard I.
item:blueprint-construction-yard-t1.name: Construction Yard I Blueprint

item:blueprint-glassworks.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Glassworks.
item:blueprint-glassworks.name: Glassworks Blueprint

item:blueprint-library-t3.description: Build plan that upgrades Library II into Library III.
item:blueprint-library-t3.name: Library III Blueprint

item:blueprint-purifier-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Purifier I.
item:blueprint-purifier-t1.name: Purifier I Blueprint

item:blueprint-roof-tile-factory.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct a Roof Tile Factory.
item:blueprint-roof-tile-factory.name: Roof Tile Factory Blueprint

item:blueprint-sand-pit.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct a Sand Pit.
item:blueprint-sand-pit.name: Sand Pit Blueprint

item:blueprint-smelter-t1.description: Build plan that can be filled with resources to construct Smelter I.
item:blueprint-smelter-t1.name: Smelter I Blueprint

item:blueprint-waste-processor-t2.description: Build plan that upgrades Waste Processor I into Waste Processor II for coal and charcoal disposal lines.
item:blueprint-waste-processor-t2.name: Waste Processor II Blueprint

item:bricks.description: Fired clay building material prepared for sturdier construction.
item:bricks.name: Bricks

item:charcoal.description: Controlled pre-industrial fuel made from logs and used by kilns and furnaces before coal mining is unlocked.
item:charcoal.name: Charcoal

item:clay.description: Raw clay prepared for brick and ceramic production.
item:clay.name: Clay

item:construction-bundle.description: Master package of fired bricks, glass, roof tiles, permits, and prestige materials used to unlock advanced civic and guild buildings.
item:construction-bundle.name: Construction Bundle

item:glass.description: Finished glass panels prepared for advanced building and luxury chains.
item:glass.name: Glass

item:gold-ingot.description: Refined gold produced by smelters from gold ore and coal.
item:gold-ingot.name: Gold Ingot

item:iron-ingot.description: Refined iron produced by smelters from iron ore and coal.
item:iron-ingot.name: Iron Ingot

item:pollution.description: Dirty board-only industrial pollution emitted by coal or charcoal processing. It stays on the board and must be cleaned by Purifier I.
item:pollution.name: Pollution

item:roof-tiles.description: Curved fired roof tiles prepared for higher-tier building construction.
item:roof-tiles.name: Roof Tiles

item:sand.description: Fine sand prepared as the base material for glassmaking.
item:sand.name: Sand

producer:bio-waste-processor-t2.description: Upgraded farm cleanup building that can also burn bio-waste with coal or charcoal when speed beats dignity.
producer:bio-waste-processor-t2.label: II
producer:bio-waste-processor-t2.name: Bio-Waste Processor II

producer:brickyard.description: Kiln workshop that fires clay into bricks for advanced construction.
producer:brickyard.name: Brickyard

producer:charcoal-burner-t1.description: Dirty kiln workshop that turns logs into charcoal and must work near a purifier.
producer:charcoal-burner-t1.name: Charcoal Burner I

producer:clay-pit.description: Prepared extraction pit that produces clay near a surveyed clay deposit.
producer:clay-pit.name: Clay Pit

producer:construction-yard-t1.description: Advanced construction yard that bundles bricks, glass, roof tiles, permits, and civic goods into settlement expansion packages.
producer:construction-yard-t1.name: Construction Yard I

producer:glassworks.description: Furnace workshop that turns sand and charcoal into glass.
producer:glassworks.name: Glassworks

producer:library-t3.description: Advanced library that researches and reissues blueprints up through Era VIII.
producer:library-t3.name: Library III

producer:purifier-t1.description: Industrial cleanup producer that must be present near dirty coal or charcoal processing and consumes board pollution together with water and fuel.
producer:purifier-t1.name: Purifier I

producer:roof-tile-factory.description: Workshop that fires clay into sturdy roof tiles.
producer:roof-tile-factory.name: Roof Tile Factory

producer:sand-pit.description: Prepared extraction pit that produces sand near a surveyed sand deposit.
producer:sand-pit.name: Sand Pit

producer:smelter-t1.description: Dirty heavy-industry furnace that refines ore with coal and water into ingots while sometimes dumping board-only pollution.
producer:smelter-t1.name: Smelter I

producer:waste-processor-t2.description: Upgraded cleanup building that can also burn trash with coal or charcoal for faster disposal and uglier air.
producer:waste-processor-t2.label: II
producer:waste-processor-t2.name: Waste Processor II
